_comment: Pinned dataplane engine versions + per-arch archive SHA256 (RP-0011 chunk C). node-bootstrap reads this as the DEFAULT --singbox-*/--xray-* pins when the operator passes no explicit flag (additive: an explicit flag still overrides; an arch not listed falls back to the required-flag behaviour). dl_base MUST equal node-bootstrap's SINGBOX_DL_BASE/XRAY_DL_BASE constants. SHA256 is over the official release archive each engine's installer downloads (sing-box: sing-box-<ver>-linux-<arch>.tar.gz; xray: Xray-linux-<token>.zip). Keys are NORMALISED arches (amd64/arm64); armv7 is intentionally uncovered (stays a required flag). Bump version + sha together; engine_manifest_shape pins the structure and the currency check ties the version to the pin CI uses. The toolchains block pins the BUILD toolchain (go) the same way (version + per-arch sha256 + dl_base == node-bootstrap GO_DL_BASE) so the node builds the spine from a PINNED, non-distro Go; go.version tracks the go.mod floor.
